summary: iOS 🟥 FLAMINGO 🦩 Unable to update Charge Case
scenario: Legend 50 headset paired with mobile app fails to show update button for Charge Case on outdated firmware, displaying a message to use desktop app instead.
description_clean: When a Legend 50 headset is paired with the app and the Charge Case is on outdated firmware, navigating to Device Settings > Software shows no update button for the Charge Case. Instead, a message is displayed: "This product can't be updated in HP Poly Studio Mobile. Use HP Poly Studio Desktop to update this product." Expected behavior is that the user should be able to update the Legend 50's Charge Case via the mobile app.
steps: 1. Pair a Legend 50 headset with the HP Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Ensure the Charge Case is on outdated firmware.
4. Observe the screen for any update button for the Charge Case.
expected: The user should be able to update the Legend 50's Charge Case via the mobile app. An update button should be visible in Device Settings > Software.
actual: No update button is displayed for the Charge Case. Instead, a message is shown: "This product can't be updated in HP Poly Studio Mobile. Use HP Poly Studio Desktop to update this product."
